form.formComment: Fair run when beaten by 4 m finishing fourth behind Royal Gypsy at Motukarara Raceway over 2170m in a 3yo+ on March 15 at $14.60. Then a handy effort when beaten by 1.4 m finishing second behind Switch On at Phar Lap Racecourse over 2100m in a 4yo+ on April 1 at $3.80. Rates highly. Draws the pegs and is a great chance to go one better.
